message:
fix(collect): three bug fixes found during code review

1. parse_io_content: use continue instead of ? for unparseable lines,
   preventing entire parse from failing on empty/malformed lines

2. deep_scan: remove unnecessary processes.clone() by computing
   process_count before moving processes into the result

3. parse_stat: use get() instead of direct slice to avoid panic when
   /proc/[pid]/stat content is truncated after closing paren

Added test_parse_stat_truncated to verify bounds checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
